query:
DELETE FROM warden_messages 
WHERE sourceEvent = 'life_lost' 
AND createdAt >= '2026-05-18 22:00:00'
AND (content LIKE '%Chess%' OR content LIKE '%Nat%' OR content LIKE '%CTM%');

SELECT pe.id, p.displayName, pe.amountPence, pe.reason, pe.status, pe.createdAt 
FROM payment_events pe
JOIN participants p ON pe.participantId = p.id
WHERE p.id IN (90005, 90007, 90008);
